ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_number" TEXT /* Course number (e.g., ADS 500A) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall 2021) */,
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course, if applicable */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the course is elective or required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_id") REFERENCES prerequisites ("prerequisite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., mandatory, recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the semester is currently active */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, graduated) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the student started the program */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "credit_hours_earned" INTEGER /* Credit hours earned by the student in the course */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the course is being audited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the faculty member works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., professor, lecturer) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who provided the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the course */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Text comments provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student involved in the communication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member involved in the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)
